headline: Vince Holding Up 54% in the Past Month: Invest More or Book Profits?
summary: VNCE is up 54% over the past month as direct-to-consumer gains and profit improvements fuel a turnaround. Should investors add or take profits?

headline: Insider One, the Leading Agentic AI Platform Powering Autonomous, End-to-End Customer Engagement, Acquires Bluecore
summary: Insider One, the leading Agentic Customer Engagement Platform, today announced its acquisition of Bluecore, a leading retail martech unicorn serving more than 400 US enterprise brands, including ALO Yoga, J.Crew, Sephora, Bloomingdale's, The North Face, Ralph Lauren, QVC, and Michael Kors. The acquisition will complement Insider One's position as the most complete agentic platform for autonomous, end-to-end customer engagement.

headline: A Hot CPI, Chips in Retreat, and $100 Oil: Tuesday's Market in Four Acts
summary: A single bad data point can rattle a session. Three arriving at once - a hotter-than-expected CPI print, oil punching through $100 a barrel, and a Federal Reserve leadership transition landing mid-week - make for the kind of Tuesday that leaves investors quietly recalibrating.
